basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Hostel Warden Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has released the official Hostel Warden Notification 2026. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the IIM Kozhikode Hostel Warden Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 60 years of age with a qualification of Graduation or equivalent can apply online on or before 02 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Hostel Warden Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIM Kozhikode Hostel Warden Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Hostel Warden Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Hostel Warden recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Hostel Warden post at IIM Kozhikode is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Hostel Warden post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Hostel Warden position at IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Hostel Warden role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to possess a Graduation or equivalent degree to be eligible for the Hostel Warden post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Hostel Warden position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Hostel Warden post is 60 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Hostel Warden post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Hostel Warden position will receive a salary of Rs. 55,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the IIM Kozhikode Hostel Warden recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Hostel Warden recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Hostel Warden post involves Screening and an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for the IIM Kozhikode Hostel Warden recruitment through the Online mode only.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a Contract-based job opportunity for the Hostel Warden position.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIM Kozhikode located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode is located in Kozhikode, Kerala. The job advertisement mentions Kochi as the city for this specific recruitment.
